name: codex-mem
description: Local-first cross-session memory search for Codex using existing session transcripts.

interface.shortDescription: Search previous Codex sessions from local transcript history.
interface.longDescription: Codex Mem builds a lightweight local index over ~/.codex/sessions, exposes MCP tools for search and drill-down, and refreshes the index at session boundaries.
defaultPrompt: Search my earlier Codex sessions for how we solved this before.
Show recent sessions related to this working directory.
Open the details for the session where we discussed this bug.
